input:
Title: Deprecate v1 API by end of Q2
Author: API Governance
Assignee: Tech Lead Fatima Al-Hassan
Labels: deprecation, breaking-change
Milestone: Q2 2026

Body:
The v1 API (endpoints under /api/v1/) will be removed on June 30, 2026. All clients must migrate to /api/v2/ before then.

Migration guide: https://docs.internal/v2-migration
Client notification owner: Developer Relations team (lead: Tom S.)
Fatima is responsible for updating the deprecation headers and publishing the sunset date.
